page_title: ALL'S RIGHT WITH THE WORLD - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Movic on 01 January 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/-/en/オールズライトウィズザワールド/dp/4896012828 

Staff

Planner: Katsumi Yasuda
Editors: Mamoru Yokota, Kousei Kimuro, Hiroshi Ishidoya, Makoto Nakamura

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4896012828
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4896012828
